narrative:
Precinct Londonderry/Washington (precinct in Guernsey County) has 628 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
